Product Details
X-Rings

Four-lobed sealing rings built for improved stability in demanding dynamic sealing conditions.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

X-Rings

A practical upgrade over standard round-section rings in many reciprocating or rotary applications.

CHX X-Rings offer better rolling resistance and contact stability, helping improve sealing efficiency and service consistency.

Four-Lobe Profile

Provides increased sealing contact and more stable positioning in the groove.

Reduced Twisting

Helps avoid rolling and twisting during dynamic movement.

Longer Service Life

Suitable for conditions requiring reliable performance over extended cycles.
